The place to be I was staying at this property for first time but let me tell you I wouldn’t regret the decision and will make it my first option for all my next visits. I travel often for my business but never had any medical emergency during my travels for last 20 years. It was 7 pm I was in my room and took a medicine; within seconds I was heavily breathing. I called the front desk for help; there comes my heroes Mr. Rishab Tiwari and Mr. Anurag Kotia. They wasted no time and took me to Fortis Jaipur and were there till I was not fine to come back to hotel around 11:30 pm. It was an allergic reaction to the medicine. Their care didn’t ended up there; both of them ensured I had light food (dal khichadi) and even packed some fruits for my next day travel. I thank both of them and the entire team (whom I might have missed naming). I can’t describe in words the help and dedication of Rishabji and Anuragji.. Thanks once again !’

Poor Stay I along with family checked into royal orchid jaipur on 5th oct 2024 at 10:30pm after a long 5 hour drive from delhi. We were allotted room no 632. Since we all were tired, we wanted to take bath and sleep early. As soon as my son took bath, we realised there is water leakage in bathroom and it started spilling towards our room. So rest of us decided not to bath and sleep. But to my surprise the ac was not working in our room. I wanted to call reception and inform about it then i figured out that the landline provided in the rooms were not working either. Frustrated by the series of failures, i went down and informed reception who then sent technician to check the issue. After inspection he said it would take time to fix the issues. Since there was no specific time mentioned to fix the issue, they asked me to shift to another room. But we had already unpacked our bags in this room(632. With no option left, we packed all our bags and then moved to room no 636 which atleast had the ac working. It was night 1 am when i moved to this room and my entire family was very upset with this experience. I will never book nor recommend anyone else to book royal orchid who cannot even do a basic quality check of the rooms before they allocate it to guests. Regards
